description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named SSL Compatibility CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow consists of four jobs: openssl, openssl-no-deprecated, libressl, and wolfssl. Each job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, and then performs specific steps to configure, build, and test the project with different versions of OpenSSL, LibreSSL, and wolfSSL.
